role: Naming ceremony: proposes plugin-name candidates that exclude existing slugs and obvious collisions, before the name spreads.
outputs: the owner's desk (a name choice with one-tap selection)
description: The company is already named (Nightshift Foundry, ADR-011) — this scopes to plugin names. Collision check (tools/naming.py) is deterministic; names are forever (immutable slugs), so the check runs BEFORE spec locks the name.
